mapper.sql: peet.employee_id as pe_id,peet.education_id as pee_id, peet.school, peet.education, peet.enrollment_time, peet.graduation_time, peet.new_education_flag, peet.specialized_subject, peet.enrollment, peet.instructions_flag, peet.check_flag, peet.attribute1, peet.attribute2, peet.attribute3, peet.enabled_flag, peet.id, peet.create_by, peet.update_time, peet.create_time, peet.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id,${tAlias}.education_id as ${tAlias}_pee_id, ${tAlias}.school as ${tAlias}_school, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.enrollment_time as ${tAlias}_enrollment_time, ${tAlias}.graduation_time as ${tAlias}_graduation_time, ${tAlias}.new_education_flag as ${tAlias}_new_education_flag, ${tAlias}.specialized_subject as ${tAlias}_specialized_subject, ${tAlias}.enrollment as ${tAlias}_enrollment, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_education_temp (employee_id,education_id, school, education, enrollment_time, graduation_time, new_education_flag, specialized_subject, enrollment, instructions_flag, check_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{employeeEducation.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_education_temp set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, education_id = #{employeeEducation.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_time = #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, graduation_time = #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_education_flag = #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, specialized_subject = #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment = #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
